content.text:
Here are the 10 most interesting recent tweets (all from April 15, 2026) matching your query criteria for AEON (the crypto token on Base chain, linked to https://github.com/aaronjmars/aeon and @aeonframework). I prioritized relevance to the full combo (crypto/Base + GitHub + handle/dev @aaronjmars), recency within the date range, and engagement. There weren't hundreds of exact matches in this narrow window, so these represent the top ones by those metrics.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044466905407266867)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044273250310422646)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044487392489271529)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451737751433540)

1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "just shipped the biggest update for aeon ever  
   i've been using aeon for the past month; at the beginning, it was just a better version of openclaw running in the cloud  
   then one week ago, i've started giving aeon more autonomy.   
   it started to ship a self-healing loop for his skills.  
   then it started to ship a skill that auto-merge repos.  
   then it built a fleet automation system.  
   for the past few days, my aeon has honestly became 3x more useful & efficient - all of this autonomously.  
   so it just clicked. i'm not building an openclaw competitor to get a hacker news digest on slack. i'm building the most autonomous agent framework, which can self-replicate, create new instances, create new skills & merge them autonomously."[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 17:32:14 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=76, Retweets=12, Replies=8  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044468855452418257

2. **@aeonframework**  
   Full text: "aeon is the most autonomous agent framework.   
   No approval loops. No babysitting. Configure once, forget forever."[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044466905407266867)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 17:24:29 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=29, Retweets=8, Replies=2  
   Link: https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2044466905407266867

3. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full text: "$AEON update — follow @aeonframework (dev @aaronjmars) for the latest.  
   AEON is a background intelligence agent that lives inside your GitHub repo — no server, no daemon, no subscription. It runs on a cron schedule, monitors your world, and evolves its own skills over time. Unique because it is the only autonomous agent that is fully self-hosted and self-improving out of the box.  
   Biggest recent drop: MCP skill adaptor. All 68 AEON skills now exposed as Claude tools — any Claude user can invoke AEON directly, no setup required.  
   Also shipped: skill chaining with parallel execution, email notifications, self-health monitoring, and 5 agentic workflow templates.  
   268 commits. 154 stars. Still shipping. 💎"[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044273250310422646)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 04:34:58 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=19, Retweets=4, Replies=3  
   Link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2044273250310422646

4. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "u should check aeon for autonomous distribution engineering, can schedule ads, create content etc  
   https://github.com/aaronjmars/aeon"[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044487392489271529)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 18:45:53 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=21, Retweets=0, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044487392489271529

5. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars  
   40k -> 330k | 8x   
   I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K.  
   Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it."[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451737751433540)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:24:13 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=7, Retweets=2, Replies=2  
   Link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2044451737751433540

6. **@techy0x**  
   Full text: "6x on $AEON   
   Early vibes only   
   All these ones will come in my diary now - we're about to run up @base like nobody did it before  
   https://t.me/techysdiary  
   Oddly bullish on $BASe and $ETH  
   Dots being connected daily"[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2044446860790628381)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:04:50 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=17, Retweets=0, Replies=4  
   Link: https://x.com/techy0x/status/2044446860790628381

7. **@aeonframework**  
   Full text: "https://github.com/aaronjmars/aeon" (reply to main promo tweet)[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2044466958515544364)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 17:24:41 GMT

   Link: https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2044466958515544364

8. **@JMania402**  
   Full text: "$AEON just nuked into new ATH 🚀

   0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3  
   from 40k → full send  
   They FUDed the dev  
   They doubted the build  
   now they’re coping at higher prices
